subcodes.first_line: In this day the Most Great Book speaketh at the advent of the Ancient King, and the prison-place doth glory before the heavens, inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کتاب اعظم بقد اتی مالک القدم ناطق مقر حبس بر سما مباهات مینماید چه که
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @being a source of light; guidance, @suffering and imprisonment
